prompt: A cinematic waist-up portrait of a refined woman in an old-fashioned library, turned slightly to the left and seated or standing close to the camera, with her face centered and partly in soft shadow. She has {argument name="hair color" default="golden blonde"} hair styled in an elegant Edwardian or early 20th-century updo with volume at the crown and loose curled strands framing the sides. She wears a high-necked {argument name="dress color" default="cream-gold"} lace dress with intricate floral texture and delicate trim, plus one visible dangling earring. The setting is a warm, intimate study with 2 tall wooden bookcases filled with aged books in brown, green, and muted blue tones, and on the far left a softly glowing window with a sheer curtain beside 1 framed wall picture. Use golden-hour indoor lighting, amber highlights, shallow depth of field, rich wood tones, soft filmic contrast, realistic skin and fabric detail, and a quiet historical-drama mood. Compose it in a 16:9 frame, medium close-up, photorealistic, luxurious, subtle, and painterly without looking illustrated.
translatedPrompt: 一张电影感的半身肖像，描绘了一位优雅的女性身处老式图书馆中，身体略微向左转，坐着或站立在靠近镜头的位置，面部居中且部分处于柔和的阴影中。她留着 {argument name="hair color" default="金黄色"} 的头发，梳成优雅的爱德华时代或 20 世纪初风格的发髻，头顶蓬松，两侧有松散的卷发垂下。她身穿一件高领的 {argument name="dress color" default="奶油金色"} 蕾丝连衣裙，带有精致的花卉纹理和细腻的饰边，并佩戴着一只清晰可见的吊坠耳环。背景是一个温暖而私密的书房，有 2 个高大的木制书架，摆满了棕色、绿色和柔和蓝色调的旧书；最左侧是一扇透着柔和光线的窗户，窗边挂着薄纱窗帘，旁边还有 1 幅装裱好的墙面挂画。采用黄金时段的室内光线、琥珀色高光、浅景深、浓郁的木质色调、柔和的电影质感对比度、逼真的皮肤和织物细节，营造出安静的历史剧氛围。构图采用 16:9 画幅，中景特写，写实、奢华、细腻，且具有油画质感，而非插画风格。

breakdown.creativeCore: 复古图书馆中的电影感女性：此提示词可生成一张 16:9 的暖色调写实风格肖像，描绘了一位优雅女性身处书架环绕的书房中，适用于历史剧视觉效果或电影感角色艺术创作。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 人物头像、社媒头像、角色主视觉、个人品牌照

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, close-up]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, cinematic]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: shallow depth, depth of field, camera]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
